ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the trip */,
  "trip_description" TEXT /* Description of the trip */,
  "category" INTEGER /* ID of the category for the trip (e.g., Business, Personal) */,
  "purpose" INTEGER /* ID of the purpose for the trip (e.g., Customer Visit, Meeting) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the trip */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the trip */,
  "start_location" INTEGER /* ID of the starting location for the trip */,
  "end_location" INTEGER /* ID of the ending location for the trip */,
  "miles" REAL /* Distance traveled in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_location FOREIGN KEY ("end_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_location FOREIGN KEY ("start_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense report */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the expense report */,
  "total_expense" REAL /* Total expense for the trip */,
  "submit_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_reports_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, manager, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with the expense */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense type (e.g., transportation, accommodation, food) */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "expense_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_expenses_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_expenses_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)
